description_long: This bungalow features a modern architectural design with a prominent hip roof and a mix of geometric forms. The front facade includes a driveway leading to a garage, landscaped gardens, and a covered entryway. Large windows and glass doors are distributed asymmetrically, providing ample natural light and views of the surrounding greenery. The backyard boasts a swimming pool, patio area, and additional landscaping, including trees and shrubs. The exterior is finished in neutral tones, with a combination of smooth wall surfaces and glass elements. The property is bordered by hedges and includes multiple parking spaces and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern bungalow with a hip roof, large windows, landscaped gardens, a driveway, garage, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the driveway, garage, front garden, and partial side yard with greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, patio, glass doors, and lush landscaping.
description_view_3: Side-rear view showing the pool, patio, side garden, and the driveway extending to the street.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
